name: Bot wins round — refire repro
description: Round 1, bot's turn, deck empty. Bot (P2) is forced to play Encrypted Key (rules force it when paired with Swap). After advanceTurn the human's draw fails and resolveRound fires: bot's remaining Swap(7) beats human's Sniffer(2), bot wins round 1, round 2 starts with the bot as first player. Before the MaybeFireBot recursive re-fire, the bot stayed stuck in round 2 until the ~60s turn timer advanced the turn. After the fix, the bot plays round 2 immediately. Reload and confirm the bot executes round 2's first move without waiting.
